title: Local AI Experiments
tagline: Experiments with local models, retrieval, tool use, and privacy-aware AI assistants
problem: Cloud-hosted AI services raise privacy, cost, and dependency concerns. Exploring what is possible with local inference and retrieval on consumer hardware.
solution: Running local language models, building RAG pipelines, and experimenting with agent tool use. Focused on privacy-aware, offline-capable AI workflows.
impact: Ongoing learning track. Informing how I think about AI-assisted security tooling and local intelligence.
